# TaxSort

> TaxSort is an AI-powered mobile app for freelancers and self-employed individuals to manage taxes effortlessly.

## What is TaxSort?
TaxSort helps freelancers, independent contractors, gig workers, and self-employed individuals manage their taxes year-round. The app uses AI to scan receipts, track mileage via GPS, automatically categorize expenses, and generate audit-ready PDF reports.

## Key Features
- AI receipt scanning: Snap a photo of any receipt and AI reads, categorizes, and stores it instantly
- GPS mileage tracking: Automatically track business trips and calculate deductions
- Smart expense categorization: AI sorts expenses into CRA and IRS-approved tax categories
- Audit-ready export: Generate professional PDF reports for accountants in one tap
- Secure cloud backup: All data encrypted and backed up 24/7
- Real-time savings tracker: See estimated tax savings update live

## Who is TaxSort for?
- Freelancers
- Independent contractors
- Gig workers (Uber, DoorDash, Lyft drivers)
- Self-employed consultants
- Small business owners
- Anyone who needs to track business expenses for taxes

## Pricing
- Free plan: AI receipt scanning, expense tracking, basic reports
- Pro plan: Unlimited exports, GPS mileage, priority support, advanced analytics

## Platforms
- iOS (App Store)
- Android (Google Play)

## Tax Support
- Canada (CRA tax categories)
- United States (IRS tax categories)

## Contact
- Website: https://taxsort.com
